# Figma Checklist Converter - AI Coding Instructions

This widget allows users to input blocks of text (paragraphs with bullets or numbering) and automatically converts them into interactive checklist items in Figma/FigJam.

## Project Goal
- Transform multi-line text input into individual checklist tasks.
- Support common list prefixes like numbers (`1.`, `2)`), bullets (`•`, `*`, `-`), and spaces.
- Maintain persistent state for checkboxes across sessions.

## Architecture & Project Structure

```
widget-src/
  code.tsx                  ← Entry point: state management + widget.register() only (~70 lines)
  types.ts                  ← Shared TypeScript interfaces (TaskItem)
  constants/
    colors.ts               ← All COLOR_* constants (single source of truth)
    icons.ts                ← All inline SVG strings (ICON_PLUS, ICON_CHECK, etc.)
  utils/
    parseTasks.ts           ← Pure function: converts raw text input into TaskItem[]
  components/
    Header.tsx              ← Renders title and task count subtitle
    ActionBar.tsx           ← Add Items button, Edit/Delete toggles, Clear All
    TaskRow.tsx             ← Individual task row: checkbox, text input, indent/merge controls
  ui/
    import.html             ← Standalone HTML modal for pasting text input
dist/
  code.js                   ← Bundled output generated by esbuild (do not edit)
```

- **Entry Point**: [widget-src/code.tsx](widget-src/code.tsx) — orchestrates state and composes components.
- **Output**: [dist/code.js](dist/code.js) — bundled by esbuild; never edit directly.
- **Figma Widget API**: Uses `AutoLayout`, `Text`, `Input`, `SVG`, `useSyncedState` from `figma.widget`.

## Key Patterns

### State Management
- All widget state lives in [widget-src/code.tsx](widget-src/code.tsx) via `useSyncedState` and is passed down as props.
- Three state keys: `tasks` (TaskItem[]), `isEditing` (bool), `isRemoving` (bool).
- **Crucial Update Pattern**: Always deep-copy state before mutating to ensure Figma reactivity:
  ```tsx
  const copy: TaskItem[] = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(tasks));
  copy[index].checked = val;
  setTasks(copy);
  ```

### TaskItem Type
Defined in [widget-src/types.ts](widget-src/types.ts):
```ts
interface TaskItem {
  id: string;
  text: string;
  checked: boolean;
  isChild?: boolean;  // true = sub-task, false/undefined = parent task
}
```

### Text-to-Checklist Logic
Located in [widget-src/utils/parseTasks.ts](widget-src/utils/parseTasks.ts):
- Split input by newlines, filter empty lines.
- Lines matching `/^\d+[/.)]\s*/` are treated as **parent** tasks.
- All other lines become **child** tasks under the preceding parent.
- Every item gets a unique `id` via `Date.now().toString() + "-" + index`.

### Parent/Child Checkbox Logic
Implemented inside [widget-src/components/TaskRow.tsx](widget-src/components/TaskRow.tsx):
- Checking a **parent** automatically checks all its immediate children.
- Checking all **children** automatically checks the parent.
- Unchecking any child unchecks the parent.

### External UI (Modals)
- [widget-src/ui/import.html](widget-src/ui/import.html) is injected via `figma.showUI(__html__, ...)`.
- The HTML posts messages with `window.parent.postMessage({ pluginMessage: { type: 'add-tasks', text } }, '*')`.
- [widget-src/components/ActionBar.tsx](widget-src/components/ActionBar.tsx) handles `figma.ui.onmessage` and calls `parseTasks()`.

### Icons & Colors
- All SVG icon strings are in [widget-src/constants/icons.ts](widget-src/constants/icons.ts) — import by name, never inline.
- All color values are in [widget-src/constants/colors.ts](widget-src/constants/colors.ts) — never hardcode hex values in components.

## Developer Workflows
- **Development**: Run `npm run watch` to automatically recompile on save.
- **Type Checking**: Run `npm run tsc` to check for TypeScript errors across all files.
- **Building**: `npm run build` generates the final production bundle.

## Folders to Ignore
- `dist/`
- `node_modules/`
